verses.text: In the last days 'perilous times' shall come; men shall be lovers of self, 'having a form of godliness, but denying the power.' Empty religion. The last days are marked by godless self-love.

In the last days 'perilous times' shall come; men shall be lovers of self, 'having a form of godliness, but denying the power.' Empty religion. The last days are marked by godless self-love.
Such creep into houses and lead silly women captive; they resist the truth, 'but they shall proceed no further.' Exposed. Their folly shall be made plain to all.

Thou hast known my doctrine and persecutions; 'all that will live godly in Christ Jesus shall suffer persecution.' Sure suffering. The godly must expect opposition.
Thou hast known my doctrine and persecutions; 'all that will live godly in Christ Jesus shall suffer persecution.' Sure suffering. The godly must expect opposition.
Thou hast known my doctrine and persecutions; 'all that will live godly in Christ Jesus shall suffer persecution.' Sure suffering. The godly must expect opposition.
Evil men and seducers 'shall wax worse and worse, deceiving, and being deceived.' Downward. Sin deepens in those who spread it.
Continue in what thou hast learned; 'from a child thou hast known the holy scriptures.' Hold fast. Early-learned Scripture is a lasting anchor.
Continue in what thou hast learned; 'from a child thou hast known the holy scriptures.' Hold fast. Early-learned Scripture is a lasting anchor.
'All scripture is given by inspiration of God, and is profitable for doctrine,' that the man of God be perfect. God-breathed. Scripture equips the believer for every good work.
